events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Need infer scenario: field review of Spool erection & fit-up shows expected unit in intended location, nameplates orientation marks readable, housing adjacent work no damage, matches referenced detail for this stage. Ref ASME B31.3, iso drawings. This seems a pass rough-complete. No defects. Need produce JSON matching schema. Need include decision pass, risk low, work_stage rough-complete, component_conditions empty, percent_complete maybe 75? rough-complete around 80? Spool erection & fit-up rough-complete. Value 0 since no numeric. confidence 0.95. event_time 0 rate 0. order empty workable empty. findings actions. rationale references. Ensure valid JSON raw no markdown.
